# Sample Characters

Put public example character JSON files in this folder.

Each file should use the same import/export shape as the app:

```json
{
  "type": "HEROIC 5e Character Generator",
  "version": 2,
  "exportedAt": "2026-06-19T00:00:00.000Z",
  "sheet": {
    "heroName": "Example Hero"
  }
}
```

Update `manifest.json` whenever a new sample is added so the app can list it later.
